use_codes.desc: EXTENDED ADJUVANT TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH EARLY STAGE HER2-OVEREXPRESSED/AMPLIFIED BREAST CANCER, TO FOLLOW ADJUVANT TRASTUZUMAB BASE THERAPY

USE IN COMBINATION WITH CAPECITABINE, FOR THE TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH ADVANCED OR METASTATIC HER2-POSITIVE BREAST CANCER WHO HAVE RECEIVED TWO OR MORE PRIOR ANTI-HER2 BASED REGIMENS IN THE METASTATIC SETTING
EXTENDED ADJUVANT TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH EARLY-STAGE HUMAN EPIDERMAL GROWTH FACTOR RECEPTOR 2 (HER2)-POSITIVE BREAST CANCER, TO FOLLOW ADJUVANT TRASTUZUMAB BASED THERAPY

indications.text:
1.1 Extended Adjuvant Treatment of Early-Stage Breast Cancer
NERLYNX as a single agent is indicated for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early-stage
human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-positive breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based
therapy [see Clinica...

1.1 Extended Adjuvant Treatment of Early-Stage Breast Cancer
NERLYNX as a single agent is indicated for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early-stage
human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-positive breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based
therapy [see Clinica...

NERLYNX is indicated for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early-stage human epidermal
growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-positive breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based therapy [see
Clinical Studies (14)].

NERLYNX is indicated for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early stage HER2-
overexpressed/amplified breast cancer, to follow adjuvant trastuzumab based therapy [see Clinical Studies
(14)].
